title: Corrigendum S.O. 1254(E), dated 01/06/2011 to S.O. 1004(E), dated 05/05/2011 and Corrigendum S.O. 1255(E) dated 01/06/2011 to S.O. 1005(E), dated 05/05/2011 - Appointment of Expert Members & Judicial Members in the National Green Tribunal

RR WI RRR 3 RTR R?t 3jqfa fdR” r£ I [RR. 4 17/11/201 l-41i(d/U.dRlel] Wl'!?! ^R, R^RR RfRR MINISTRY OF ENVIRONMENT AND FORESTS CORRIGENDUM New Delhi, the 1 st June, 2011 S.0.1254(E).—In the notification of the Ministry of Environment and Forests, Government of India, number S.O. 1004(E), dated the 5th May, 2011, published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, Sub section (ii) of the same date, at page 1, in line 3, for “with effect from the date of publication of this notification for a period of five years”, read “for a period of five years from the date on which they enter upon their office”. R. 17/11/2011 -Ml^d/l^Rldl] R’HIr tt^dd RfRR CORRIGENDUM New Delhi, the 1st June, 2011 S.0.1255(E).—In the notification of the Ministry of Environment and Forests, Government of India, number S.O. 1005(E), dated the 5th May, 2011, published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, Sub section (ii) of the same date, at page 2, in line 3, for “with effect from the date of publication of this notification for a period of five years”, read “for a period of five years from the date on which they enter upon their office”.
